text: Standing before this exhibit, I am enveloped by a sense of reflection and curiosity. The wall's message about research and development connects my thoughts to the rapid changes of technology, and how each innovation shapes, unites, or segregates us. There is a gentle hum of purpose here—each object and word has been curated to spark a quiet dialogue within me about progress, meaning, and belonging. I feel distantly connected to the broader human story, as if I am both observer and participant in our unfolding narrative of striving to connect.
